★ Jean-Baptiste Chauvin ★

Engineering Manager · hands-on
● Available for opportunities

33 yo.

React Native & React specialist with 10+ years of production experience — from solo freelancer to Engineering Manager leading a 10-person team at Cegedim Santé. Deep technical expertise (React Native, React, TypeScript, Node.js, PHP, AWS) paired with solid product sense and strong human leadership. Delivered apps used by 170k+ users in healthcare, civic, and mobility sectors. 13 projects shipped independently.

💼 Career

My professional journey.
Period Company Role Details Stack
2023 – Present
● NOW
Infobam groupe GBH
(Carrefour / Promocash — DOM-TOM)
 Engineering Manager Leading loyalty programs and eCommerce platforms (Carrefour, Promocash) for the French overseas territories. Managing a team of 2 developers and 1 DevOps engineer across mobile, full-stack and infrastructure (CI/CD, cloud, deployments). react-nativetypescriptreactazurekotlin
2011 – Present
● NOW
Auto-entreprise
Freelance Web & Mobile Developer Web and mobile development for external clients: Docavenue, Mon Spécialiste Auto, CityVolt, RallyRec, eScoot. Websites (Altusform, Induste). Migration of high-traffic platforms (Tom's Guide, Tom's Hardware — 8M+ posts, 1.5M users). In parallel, 13 personal apps shipped independently to the App Store and Play Store: RUNinTWO, Tactic.Coach, Horizon, PushX, RetroTrip, ChronoClub, Alerte Naturalisation, Paris Toilet Finder, Paris Water Map, Elegant Paris Watch Face (Garmin). react-nativereactnodejsphptypescript
2019 – 2023
Cegedim Santé
Dev → Lead Dev → Engineering Manager (Mobile) Built, then led the mobile team behind the Maiia patient and doctor apps (téléconsultation, online scheduling). Grew from developer to Engineering Manager overseeing 10 React Native developers and test engineers within a fast-scaling health startup. react-nativetypescriptjavawebsocketsaws
2017 – 2018
TKorp
Co-founder & CTO Co-founded TKorp, a web and VR development studio. Built showcase websites, drove SEO strategy, and contributed to VR game projects under Unity. reacttypescriptunityseophp
2017 – 2017
Ippon Technologies
DevOps Consultant DevOps consulting at Ippon Technologies. Supported enterprise clients on deployment automation, containerisation and continuous integration pipelines. dockerkubernetesawsjenkinsansible
2015 – 2017
BforBank
DevOps Apprentice Key member of the BforBank integration team. Built and deployed innovative internal tools now at the heart of the project lifecycle. Contributed to onboarding new recruits, improved tools and processes, and consistently exceeded objectives. linuxansiblejenkinsjavamaven

Computer Methods Applied to Business Management · Graduated 15/20
